creator: togetherthinking13@gmail.com
text:
Allowing users to edit comments on bug tracking systems like Bugzilla helps maintain clarity and reduces confusion caused by typos or poor wording. On bugzilla.mozilla.org, comment editing is implemented with version control, logging edits for transparency. Investigating their implementation could provide insights into balancing user flexibility with accountability.
look for:  https://www.freebsd.org/administration.html#t-bugmeister https://amongusonline.co
